tagline: Global Stock Momentum Tracker for Beginners
description: MomentumRadar tracks stock momentum across 13 global markets — US, Europe, Asia-Pacific and ASEAN. Real daily data, a transparent 0–100 Momentum Score, 90-day momentum history and beginner-friendly analysis. Free, no account needed.
adsense_note: Set adsense_client to your AdSense publisher ID, e.g. ca-pub-1234567890123456, after your site is approved. Leave empty to render no ad code.
